## Commit format

Commits must follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/):

```
<type>(<scope>): <description>
```

Example: `feat(vle): add wallet transaction status labels`

See [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) and `.cursor/skills/commit-rabbit/`.
